channel.title: CS-112 Algorithmic Complexity :: CS Two Year Refactor
channel.description: CS-112 — Algorithmic Complexity 1 credit Working description Big-O, sorting/searching — the COST of structural choices; how to choose among implementations satisfying the same contract (handoff from B3). Optimization-reasoning seed. Loosely pairs with MATH-102 (B3). To develop Learning outcomes / competencies evidenced Week-by-week map (8 weeks) Signature/embedded assessments Threads passing through (with pass depth) Prerequisites and standalone-extractability (for service use)
